name: Court of Shadows
quote: "We are the shadows in the dark, the whispers in the ears of kings."
description: A subterranean network of spies, assassins, and thieves led by the Roach. Built into hidden root caverns, they serve Prince Dain and gather secrets from every corner of Elfhame.
history: Formed in secret, the Court of Shadows operates from dark root chambers deep beneath the forest floor. They deal in the most dangerous currency of Elfhame: secrets, lies, and poisons. Their loyalty belongs only to their leader and their craft.
events: Jude Duarte was inducted and trained in espionage and combat by the Roach.
Stealing the coronation invitation and plotting the royal counter-coup.
Infiltrating Balekin's fortress to rescue captured spies.
secrets: The hideout entrances are hidden beneath the roots of hollow oak trees.
The Bomb keeps gunpowder kegs hidden behind the cellar bricks.
A spy is hidden behind the curtains in every major court chamber.
